capture_method: manual copy (Google blocks automated review fetch from this environment)
rating_note: Every review on the listing is 5 stars (confirmed by client). Star icons are image-based so weren't in the copied text, but all are verified 5.

reviews.author: bhavik damania
reviews.text: My house garage door spring broke. I got reference for Ryan Garage Repairs and would say I got the best reference. Badru and his teammate were very friendly and professional and fixed my garage door within an hour ! He also recommended to upgrade the rotators as were gonna get worn out soon then later. Highly recommend them for Garage door service !

reviews.author: Robert Dittmann
reviews.text: Muwonge did an excellent job. Very professional amd reasonably priced. I highly reccomend them... Could not have been nicer or done a better job. P.s. it was very cold out also!

reviews.author: Bryan Kigongo
reviews.text: Called this guy in on a house call. He came the same day and did this fantastic job. Will definitely be my guy for anything garage door related here on our. 10/10 easily. Such a nice guy as well

reviews.author: Sherwin Jose Cuya
reviews.text: Ryan replaced my entire garage door. I called him on a Wednesday and he came on a Saturday and got it fixed right away (though it is winter time). Ryan was very professional in what he do. He is fast, very efficient, very professional. He is also a very nice guy, and easy to deal with. I will definitely recommend him to my friends and family. Thank you Ryan for a very wonderful work. I love my new garage.

reviews.author: sam amir
reviews.text: Fantastic service! The installers were professional, punctual, and did a perfect job installing my garage doors. Very impressed with the quality of work. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kendra Green
reviews.text: Ryan was fast, honest and went above and beyond! My garage door broke and the weather was horrible. Ryan worked in 2 degree temp to get it done and was very kind and honest! Would use again!

reviews.author: Frank Halek
reviews.text: I contacted Ryan Garage Door Service to balance my 35 year old steel sectional garage door which I believe caused my garage door opener to fail. These guys were fantastic. Not only did they do a great job balancing my door, but made me a very reasonable offer to install a brand new opener. I chose a new Genie (although they also carry Chamberlain and LiftMaster). It only took about an hour for them to install the new opener. I am very happy with their product and the quality of service. They did a great job and saved me money and aggravation. I would definitely recommend Ryan Garage Door Service to my friends and family.

reviews.author: Grace Goodwin
reviews.text: Very pleased today. For Garage Door Maintenance, Ryan Garage Door performed thorough upkeep, springs, rollers, balance checked; lubrication, sensor tested. The door runs smoothly now, quiet and secure. Professional service, on-time, fair pricing. Would hire again. 👍 …

reviews.author: Lawrence Servin
reviews.text: I waited a week before writing this. Ryan Garage Door replaced weatherstripping and adjusted the garage door operation. The door opens and closes smoother and quieter now. It also seals better. I'm glad I called Ryan and will use them when it's time for regular maintenance.

reviews.author: Shreyash Nayak
reviews.text: Ryan is a very professional and polite individual. He showed up to repair and fix our garage door issues on time and worked diligently and efficiently to get them solved. He was a pleasure to interact with and we were very happy with his service. We will use his help for our garage doors needs in the future.

reviews.author: Andrew Stack
reviews.text: Badru and his team are top notch. Fast, responsive, and knowledgeable. Prices are great and he will solve your garage door problems or get you squared away with a new install when needed. Looking forward to working with him again in the future!

reviews.author: Adam Selva
reviews.text: Ryan garage door- the guy is simply awesome. He came on Sunday afternoon and replace my garage door opener with a new Gunner one. He did above and beyond- fixed my door as well. I can't believe such a nice guy.

reviews.author: William Foulks
reviews.text: I had some accidental damage to my garage door. Ryan Garage came out promptly gave me an estimate and once I was ready, they were here the next day. The installation was professional, and I couldn't recommend a better company for any garage work.

reviews.author: Gerry Diaz
reviews.text: Ryan called, to set up an appointment to come look at the problem. He gave a time of arrival, then when running late, messaged with an apology and new ETA, which he made on time. He arrived and within 15 seconds knew what the issue was, but was polite enough to let me go through my story of what happened and why I called. He quickly quoted what he believed needed to be done, and then mentioned that additional work may be needed if first resolution did not work. Quoted all work. He got to work and fixed the issue with just the first idea he had. The entire experience was handled very professionally! Recommend him 100%

reviews.author: daniel calhoun
reviews.text: Ryan's Garage Door service installed two openers for us. Very experienced and professional. He was very detailed and explained all of the different functions of the system. He programmed all of the remotes and both keypads. Cleaned up after the job was completed. Rest assured, he has been available for after the sale questions and assistance.We are very happy with the purchase.

reviews.author: Doug Gregg
reviews.text: Ryan and his team are phenomenal! I got numerous quotes for a garage door and opener replacement, Ryan's price was the best by far and there is zero drop off in quality of work or customer care from the higher priced contractors. I 100% recommend working with Ryan Garage Door!

reviews.author: carol jones
reviews.text: Ryan is fantastic. He is prompt, reasonable, and competent. His prices are fair, and his professionalism is refreshing.

reviews.author: Chuck Gray
reviews.text: I called Ryan to come out and do a P.M on my garage door today. He did a great job and very fair price. Give this gentleman a call for any of your garage door needs

reviews.author: Carolyne Kereere
reviews.text: Ryan was very professional, efficient, polite and has the best customer service. Very easy to reach and answer any questions you have. Reasonable pricing too. Thank you Ryan and team.

reviews.author: Bisegerwa John
reviews.text: Timely service with a humble and trusted touch. Great pricing and honest advice is what Ryan Garage Door service delivers. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Sensei Smith
reviews.text: Huge shoutout to Ryan Garage Door for the amazing job on my garage door upgrade! 🔧🚪 ✅ Replaced the garage lift, sensors, and track wheels ✅ Arrived early (not just on-time!) ✅ Finished the job quickly and professionally ✅ Fair and reasonable pricing ✅ Walked me through how to download and use the garage door app — so I can open and close the door from anywhere 📱🙌 If you're looking for reliable, honest, and efficient garage door work, I highly recommend them. Great service from start to finish! 👌

reviews.author: Calvin Young
reviews.text: I recently had a garage door installed and programmed, and I couldn't be more pleased with the experience! The technician was punctual, professional, and extremely knowledgeable about the functionality of the door. He took the time to explain everything in detail, ensuring I understood how to operate and maintain it properly. Their expertise and customer service were truly top-notch. The installation was smooth, efficient, and exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this company to anyone looking for high-quality service and professionalism. Five stars all the way! 🚪✨

reviews.author: Emily
reviews.text: We had a really great experience with Ryan. He answered our inquiry immediately and came out within an hour. He was incredibly honest and very nice and personable. The company before him said our garage door was not fixable and quoted us $800+. Ryan pinpointed the actual issue which was completely different and much, much cheaper. We'll be calling him in the future and recommending him to everyone. Thanks again.

reviews.author: Guner Baran
reviews.text: Ryan did an outstanding job installing the doors for my mechanic shop. From start to finish, he was professional, disciplined, and highly skilled. He arrived on time, worked efficiently, and ensured that everything was completed to perfection. His attention to detail and commitment to quality were evident throughout the entire process. What impressed me the most was his dedication to delivering the project exactly as promised. He didn't cut corners, communicated clearly, and made sure I was satisfied with the final result. On top of that, his pricing was very reasonable compared to other quotes I received. It's rare to find someone who offers both high-quality work and affordability, but Ryan delivered both. If you need someone who takes their work seriously, provides excellent service, and offers fair pricing, I highly recommend Ryan. Thanks again for your great work!

reviews.author: Osman Kigongo
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Ryan's Garage! My garage door broke on a cold day, and Ryan responded quickly to my call. He arrived on time, diagnosed the problem, and fixed it efficiently. Not only did he get everything working perfectly, but he also upgraded my system, so now I can control my garage door from anywhere using the new app on my phone. His professionalism, expertise, and fair pricing make him the go-to guy for garage repairs. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Denese Barrera
reviews.text: Ryan and Moush installed my door and did extra stuff for free! I knew right away that they were true professionals. I saw them put my garage door with ease and without hesitation on the whole installation! They were friendly, fast and professional. I definitely will refer them to my family and friends!!!!

reviews.author: Patricia Kamarangu
reviews.text: Ryan Garage Door Ltd is the best company that you can use if you need your garage fixed! Not only are they to the details but very very professional. They were able to get us an appointment last minute and fixed our garage .We are super happy.Excellent service and will always refer Ryan Garage door always . Blessings

reviews.author: Bill Bunker
reviews.text: Ryan was great. He and his colleague showed up, quickly diagnosed the issue and within an hour had my new door opener installed…all at a great price. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Nick Rossi
reviews.text: Got an alert on my phone that the garage door didn't shut all the way after a delivery was dropped off. When I pulled into the drive way one of the crews stopped by to see if I needed service. He looked at it gave me a reasonable quote and … [truncated by Google]

reviews.author: AP
reviews.text: Ryan was extremely professional, responsive, and courteous throughout the entire process. From the beginning, he was honest and transparent, offering helpful recommendations beyond the original reason I contacted him. … [truncated by Google]

reviews.author: L J
reviews.text: It's always refreshing to get an honest, helpful, and reasonably priced contractor to quickly resolve a problem- and that is Ryan Garage Door. I hired Ryan for a problem w/my garage door not opening and he … [truncated by Google]

reviews.author: italia3691
reviews.text: Garage door spring broke and after some quotes I settled on Ryan Garage Door in Huntley to do the job for me he showed up within a few hours and did a quick & FANTASTIC JOB at a GREAT PRICE & even included free maintenance on the door! … [truncated by Google]

reviews.author: Mark Forde
reviews.text: Don't look anywhere else. This is the best company you can call for a garage door repair. I found him on thumbtack on Sunday at 1:00, job was completed by 6:00. No up charge for a Sunday, garage door works better than ever. Didn't try to up sell me a new unit; fixed the problem for a very reasonable price! Don't call anyone else, this guy is the man!

reviews.author: Eamon O'Malley
reviews.text: They installed a garage door for my sister and did great work so had them work at my house too- Awesome Service! work completed in a timely matter Installed keypad and made sure doors were working properly and was very friendly Would definitely recommend Great work! Wheaton

reviews.author: hakim ssemanda
reviews.text: Ryan saved me i called him in the morning my door couldn't lock and the Garage as well , such a professional and hardworking guy he also recommended a few things and his very extremely affordable ,I would definitely recommend him for another job.

reviews.author: Bukenya Mugasa
reviews.text: After all the companies i had fix my garage door, Ryan garage door looked towards solving my issue more efficiently than the others did, will always consider this company first

reviews.author: Omer Younus Darsot
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience with Ryan Garage Door! Badru was incredibly professional and efficient, replacing my garage door opener in just 30 minutes. Not only did he offer exceptional service, but he also gave me an amazing deal on a second garage door opener, which he replaced for me as well. I truly appreciate the quality of work and the great prices. If you're looking for reliable garage door repairs, installations, or opener services, I highly recommend Badru and Ryan Garage Door for all your garage door needs!

reviews.author: Dani Fakic
reviews.text: Nothing but great words for Ryan Garage Door. Checked few places, but im so glad i picked him to install my garage door. He is very helpful and suggests what door is the best choice. Very prompt, the door was ready even before his estimated time. Did a very nice job and he really nice too. Strongly recommended, trust me you wont be making a mistake.

reviews.author: Hiren Mehta
reviews.text: The response and service was quick. The cost was reasonable, and the work was performed very well

reviews.author: Huzaimu Bukenya
reviews.text: Great work installed my new doors very professional I will definitely recommend them

reviews.author: Antoinette Westbrooks
reviews.text: Ryan does a great job. He did a really good job on my garage door. He deserved five stars. He does great work..

reviews.author: Bruce Laffee
reviews.text: Called to have a new garage door opener installed. They said they would arrive about 3:00, actually arrived a little earlier. They quoted a price and installed the new opener win about 1.5 hours. They were professional and knew what they were doing. They also had a great sense of humor.

reviews.author: Housen Motion pictures
reviews.text: I had to rush in the morning for work at 7 am I hit my garage accidentally and door couldn't open. I was stuck. Called Ryan garage door . Such a professional guy , he came as soon he couldn't and saved me plus he never took advantage of my situation the price was reasonable thanks to him am referring my other brother to him he needs some work done on his garage. Thanks Ryan i appreciate

reviews.author: Tanvi Patel
reviews.text: If I could give 10,000 stars, I would! I found Muwonge through Facebook Marketplace and he did an outstanding job installing my garage door opener. He was quick, professional, and clearly experienced. The installation was smooth, and the opener works perfectly. Muwonge also took the time to explain how everything works, which I really appreciated. It's rare to find service this reliable. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: TUNDE O
reviews.text: Very satisfied customer. He went above and beyond getting my garage door in a better shape than it was. He is passionate about what he does. I highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Suresh Reddy Chilukuri
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Ryan for my garage repair. He delivered quality work at a reasonable price, showing professionalism and efficiency throughout the process. It's refreshing to find such reliable service without breaking the bank. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Luai Fakhouri
reviews.text: I reached out today to have my chain drive garage door motor replaced with a quieter belt drive system. To my surprise, a service tech arrived the same day! He was incredibly professional, efficient, and fair with pricing. Not only did he replace the motor I called about, but he also checked the second garage door motor and made some adjustments to ensure it was working properly. He kept all the wiring clean and organized, and even took the time to help set up the WiFi connection and mobile app on my phone. He went above and beyond. I highly recommend this company and will absolutely be calling them again in the future.

reviews.author: Betty Callahan
reviews.text: Super young man was able to get my garage set up as I always hoped it would be. I'm so happy I called the phone # in our Sunday paper and very happy!!

reviews.author: David Lin
reviews.text: My garage door was broken. Ryan came the next morning and fixed it quickly. The price is very reasonable. Highly recommended

reviews.author: Leilah256
reviews.text: Best services ever. They're on time and available whenever needed. They did an excellent job fixing my garage door and installing a new keypad. I recommend and trust them with all garage door services

reviews.text: Highly recommend! The team did an excellent job—very professional, friendly, and efficient. They fixed my garage doors quickly and hassle-free. Great service!

reviews.author: Trina Garcia
reviews.text: Excellent service from Badru and his partner. Very efficient and informative. Thank you. Would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: William Unterschuetz
reviews.text: Ryan came within 2 hrs of my call. Replaced broken gear box within 1hr. Back up and running like new. Great professional and greater guy.

reviews.text: If there is an option for 10 stars i would put 10 with no hesitations. Phenomenal!!!I have been checking prices and other options before i got to him and he is definitely the cheapest option and did a phenomenal job. Very nice and prompt. Call him for a garage door replacement, you wont regret it!!!

reviews.author: Tara Villegas
reviews.text: Badareyou was very quick to respond to my quote request, came next day and had the job done in under an hour. Very great service, nice guy, and fair prices. Thank you for the great service!

reviews.author: Lin Zhang
reviews.text: Sunday night 7pm getting home but found garage door was broken. Found Ryan on Thumbtack through next door. He came around 10:30pm and worked until 12:30 after midnight. Fixed and tested everything. The garage door opens and closes more smoothly than before. Price was very reasonable. Thanks, Ryan! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Matin Meskin
reviews.text: He changed the broken spring of my garage door. He is professional, on time and the price is reasonable. Highly recommended him.

reviews.author: Mamlaki Abubakar
reviews.text: I can't say enough good things about Rayan Garage Door Service! From start to finish, the experience was great. Rayan, the technician, was absolutely fantastic—on time, quick, and very professional. The price was more than fair, and he truly went above and above to make sure the job was done right. If you need garage door service in Chicagoland, look no further. I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Robert Kiggundu
reviews.text: Winter time, accidental crush into the garage door, Ryan's Garage was quick to respond, normalized the situation so we can get the cars out. Later on replaced the door with a personal touch. 👏👏🤝 …

reviews.text: I was impressed by the detailed explanation on how to maintain my Garage Doors given to me by the technician from Ryan Garage Door. Their prices are very reasonable.

reviews.author: Ikram P
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing crew. They came next day to inspect and diagnose the issue with my garage door. Two days after the inspection my garage door was rolling smooth. The door alignment was off, they removed the old spring, put new torsion spring, remove old track and add newer tracks, installed new rollers, new motor. My door is super smooth now. Very highly recommended. Worth just calling and asking few questions about your garage door issue.

reviews.text: Nice and good job

reviews.text: RYAN and his helper are professionals, they came in a timely manner. Went right to work.Had the whole job done in 2 1/2 hours.BEAUTIFUL job,very happy.Also came from Chicago area to Racine Wisconsin. Highly recommended.

reviews.text: They came out within 3 hours and it took less than an hour to replace my broken spring. It was a very pleasant experience compared to my very horrible start of the day, when the spring broke.

reviews.author: Speedy H
reviews.text: Ryan garage door in Huntley, IL did a great job installing my garage door. My spring broke and since the door was 20 years old, I decided to get a new garage door as well. He arrived on time and did an excellent job. My new garage door looks great and works perfectly. I highly recommend Ryan Garage Door for any garage door repair or installation. Thank you Ryan!

reviews.author: Riley Rentals
reviews.text: Fast and convenient service. They prevented me from receiving a Municipal code violation by replacing my garage door. I highly recommend.

reviews.text: Wow! The Ryan Garage Door team was very professional and did an excellent job. Their pricing was very reasonable as well. We're so glad we called them to replace our garage doors!
